note: Rotary shaft seal profiles extracted from Parker EPS 5350 profile-diagram grids (pp.1-4 to 1-6, 1-9/1-10). Distinct from the EPS 5370 fluid-power (reciprocating) line in parker.json. Clipper is co-published here: clipper.json (5 profiles) is the detailed-data subset; this file is the full Parker-published rotary profile index. parent_profile and fluidseal_equivalent are null pending David's comparable list. Profiles are visual diagram codes; dimensional/material data lives in catalog body sections and appendix tables (B-E).
families: Clipper Oil Seals & Parker Oil Seals (elastomeric radial lip)
_schema_note: profiles_by_family lists every profile code per family. parent_profile and fluidseal_equivalent are null for all profiles until comparable lists are supplied; when mappings are added, expand the relevant codes into per-profile objects ({profile, family, parent_profile, fluidseal_equivalent}) the same shape parker.json uses. NOTE: SB and SM each appear in two families (Oil Seals and Bearing Isolators) as genuinely distinct profiles - disambiguate by family when wiring cross-references.
